name: Berry Global Group, Inc. (Acquired by Amcor plc)
lede: Berry runs two centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Tumkur, covering CoE, built over four years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Berry office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Berry GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Berry runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Tumkur), covering CoE. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

titles.title: Managing Director -India , Vice President -General Manager -India & Indonesia

about.description: Berry's India footprint covers Bengaluru and Tumkur, spanning CoE. The centers deliver R&D and ER&D for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 25 decision-makers, in one profile.
